welcome.title: Welcome to Tromso
welcome.description: Tromso KDE Linux — a KDE Plasma desktop built on freedesktop-sdk with bootc-powered atomic updates.

features.title: KDE Plasma 6
features.description: A complete KDE Plasma 6 desktop with Qt6, KDE Frameworks, and KDE applications.

community.title: Atomic Updates
community.description: Tromso uses bootc for image-based atomic updates. Your system stays consistent and is easy to roll back.

developer.title: Getting Started
developer.description: Visit the Hanthor project page for documentation and to file issues. We fix them.

completed.title: Ready to Install
completed.description: Select your disk and install Tromso KDE Linux. Welcome to the new world!
